ORDER GRANTING PETITION FOR AN ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER GOLDMAN, SACHS &. CO. (SEE SCANNED DOC)
